props.headline: Create an Entire Month of Content in Minutes
props.subheadline: Generate engaging AI-powered social media posts, images and captions, then automatically publish them across multiple platforms from one simple dashboard.

props.text: FACEBOOK · INSTAGRAM · LINKEDIN · TIKTOK · X (TWITTER) · PINTEREST · GOOGLE BUSINESS · THREADS · YOUTUBE · ONE CLICK · FULLY AUTOMATED

props.title: Everything You Need to Dominate Social Media
props.subtitle: Four powerful AI tools working together to handle your entire social media presence from creation to publishing.

textBlocks.text: AI Post Generator
Generate engaging, on-brand social media posts for any business in seconds. Choose your tone, topic and platform and let AI write content that actually converts followers into customers.
AI Image Creation
Automatically generate beautiful, professional social media graphics for every post. Branded, colourful and sized perfectly for each platform — no designer required.
Publish Everywhere
Connect all your social media accounts once and publish to every platform simultaneously with a single click. Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, X and more — all from one dashboard.
Plan Weeks Ahead
Stop scrambling for content every day. Create and schedule an entire month of posts in under 15 minutes, then let Gr8 Result publish everything automatically while you focus on your business.

props.title: Real Numbers. Real Results.
props.subtitle: Businesses using Gr8 Result Social Media spend less time creating content and more time growing their business.

stats.label: Minutes
stats.detail: Generate an entire month of posts, images, hashtags and captions in one campaign session.

stats.label: Platforms
stats.detail: Publish to Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, Pinterest, Google Business, Threads and YouTube simultaneously.

stats.label: Weeks
stats.detail: Schedule content weeks in advance so your social media runs on autopilot while you run your business.

stats.label: Automatic Publishing
stats.detail: Your scheduled posts publish automatically at the best times, even when you are offline or asleep.

panels.heading: One Click. 28 Days of Content. Every Platform.
panels.body: The AI Campaign Builder is the feature that sets Gr8 Result apart. Instead of creating posts one at a time, you generate an entire month of content in a single workflow — mixed promotional and educational posts, with matching AI-generated images, hashtags already created, and best posting times automatically selected.
panels.imageAlt: AI generating a month of social media content

panels.heading: Tell the AI What Your Business Does and Who It Serves
panels.body: Select your campaign type — promotional, educational, seasonal or product launch. Tell the AI your business type, target audience and tone. That is all it needs. In seconds it begins building 28 days of content tailored specifically to your business and goals.
panels.imageAlt: Choosing a social media campaign type in the dashboard

panels.heading: 28 Posts. Mixed Content. Captions, Hashtags and Images Included.
panels.body: The AI generates a balanced mix of promotional posts, educational tips, engagement questions and seasonal content — everything a professional social media manager would create, delivered in under a minute. Every post includes its caption, hashtags, emojis, a CTA and a matching AI-generated image ready to publish.
panels.imageAlt: 28 social media posts generated by AI with images and captions

panels.heading: Every Post Is Editable Before It Goes Live
panels.body: Review every post before it publishes. Change a caption, swap an image, adjust a hashtag or reschedule a date. You have full control over every piece of content. The AI does the heavy lifting but you always have the final say on what your audience sees.
panels.imageAlt: Reviewing and editing AI-generated social media posts

panels.heading: Best Posting Times Selected. Scheduled to Every Platform. Done.
panels.body: Gr8 Result automatically identifies the optimal posting times for maximum engagement on each platform, then schedules every post to all your connected accounts. Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, Pinterest, Google Business, Threads and YouTube — one schedule covers all of them. Your entire month is handled in around 15 minutes.
panels.imageAlt: Drag and drop social media scheduling calendar

props.title: Publish to Every Platform Simultaneously
props.subtitle: Connect your accounts once and Gr8 Result handles the rest. One post, one click, nine platforms reached at the same time.

props.title: AI Writes Every Type of Content You Need
props.subtitle: Stop staring at a blank screen. Tell the AI what you want and it generates professional, platform-ready content in seconds — fully editable before it publishes.

items.title: Promotional Campaigns
items.body: Promotional Campaigns Generate compelling offer posts, limited-time promotions, product launches and seasonal sales campaigns that drive clicks and conversions. The AI knows how to write urgency and desire into every word.

textBlocks.text: Promotional Campaigns

Generate compelling offer posts, limited-time promotions, product launches and seasonal sales campaigns that drive clicks and conversions. The AI knows how to write urgency and desire into every word.

items.title: Educational and Value Posts
items.body: Educational and Value Posts Build authority in your industry with how-to guides, tips, FAQs, behind-the-scenes insights and educational content that positions your business as the trusted expert customers want to hire.

textBlocks.text: Educational and Value Posts
Build authority in your industry with how-to guides, tips, FAQs, behind-the-scenes insights and educational content that positions your business as the trusted expert customers want to hire.

items.title: Engagement and Community Posts
items.body: Engagement and Community Posts Generate questions, polls, conversation starters and community-building content that gets your audience commenting, sharing and interacting — turning passive followers into active brand advocates.

textBlocks.text: Engagement and Community Posts
Generate questions, polls, conversation starters and community-building content that gets your audience commenting, sharing and interacting — turning passive followers into active brand advocates.

items.title: Captions, Hashtags and CTAs
items.body: Captions, Hashtags and CTAs Every post is generated with a tailored caption, a relevant hashtag set, natural emoji usage and a clear call to action — all matched to the platform and the objective of that specific post.

textBlocks.text: Captions, Hashtags and CTAs
Every post is generated with a tailored caption, a relevant hashtag set, natural emoji usage and a clear call to action — all matched to the platform and the objective of that specific post.

props.title: AI Creates Your Images Too
props.subtitle: Every post comes with a professionally generated graphic — no Canva, no designer, no stock photo subscription required.

items.title: Professional Graphics
items.body: Professional Graphics Clean, modern social media graphics that look like they were designed by a professional creative agency — generated automatically for every post in your campaign.

textBlocks.text: Professional Graphics
Clean, modern social media graphics that look like they were designed by a professional creative agency — generated automatically for every post in your campaign.

items.title: Branded Imagery
items.body: Branded Imagery Images generated using your business colours, fonts and visual style so every post looks consistent and recognisable across all platforms and audiences.

textBlocks.text: Branded Imagery
Images generated using your business colours, fonts and visual style so every post looks consistent and recognisable across all platforms and audiences.

items.title: Marketing Banners
items.body: Marketing Banners Eye-catching promotional banners for sales, events, product launches and special offers — created in seconds and sized correctly for every social platform.

textBlocks.text: Marketing Banners
Eye-catching promotional banners for sales, events, product launches and special offers — created in seconds and sized correctly for every social platform.

items.title: Seasonal Artwork
items.body: Seasonal Artwork Holiday campaigns, seasonal promotions and timely content with matching visuals generated automatically so your brand always looks fresh, current and relevant.

textBlocks.text: Seasonal Artwork
Holiday campaigns, seasonal promotions and timely content with matching visuals generated automatically so your brand always looks fresh, current and relevant.

cards.title: Save Hours Every Week
cards.description: What used to take hours of writing, designing and scheduling every week now takes 15 minutes once a month. Your time is better spent running your business.

cards.title: Increase Engagement
cards.description: AI-generated content is crafted for maximum audience interaction — posts that ask questions, share value and prompt real responses that grow your community.

cards.title: Stay Perfectly Consistent
cards.description: Inconsistent posting kills reach. With Gr8 Result your business posts every single day — same voice, same branding, same quality — without any daily effort from you.

cards.title: Never Run Out of Ideas
cards.description: The AI has unlimited content ideas for any industry. Whenever you need fresh campaigns, new angles or seasonal content, it is ready in seconds.

cards.title: Grow Your Brand
cards.description: Consistent, professional content builds brand recognition over time. Your audience comes to know your voice, trust your expertise and choose you over competitors.

cards.title: Reach More Customers
cards.description: Publishing across 9 platforms simultaneously puts your business in front of audiences you would never reach with a single-platform approach — without any extra effort.

cards.title: Connected to Your CRM
cards.description: Social media leads flow directly into your Gr8 Result CRM. Enquiries, clicks and messages from social platforms are tracked, followed up and never lost.

props.title: Manual Posting vs Gr8 Result
props.subtitle: See exactly what changes when you stop doing social media the hard way.

textBlocks.text: ❌ The Old Way — Manual Posting

Hours every week writing individual posts. Forgetting to post for days or weeks. Inconsistent branding across platforms. Missing trending moments and seasonal opportunities. Paying for separate design tools, scheduling apps and content calendars. Running out of ideas and posting random, unfocused content. Publishing to one or two platforms at best.

items.title: ✅  The Gr8 Result Way — AI Automated

textBlocks.text: ✅ The Gr8 Result Way — AI Automated

15 minutes to generate an entire month of content. Consistent daily posting on autopilot across all platforms. Professional AI-generated images for every post. Perfectly timed publishing at peak engagement hours. Everything managed from one platform — no extra subscriptions. Fresh campaign ideas generated on demand in seconds. Publishing to 9 platforms simultaneously with one click.

props.title: Ready To See What Your Business Could Become?
props.description: Experience the platform built by business owners, for business owners. Get started with a FREE 14-Day Trial or book a personalised demonstration and see how easy it can be to manage, market, automate, and scale your business from one powerful platform.
props.text: Click Here To Start Your 14 Day Free Trial
